P

parse(String, int) - Static method in class dev.quassel.ga.puzzle.PuzzleBoard
Parses a square board from textual tile values.
PAUSED - Enum constant in enum class dev.quassel.ga.core.RunStatus
Run is temporarily paused and can later continue.
pauseRequested() - Method in class dev.quassel.ga.core.SearchRun
Whether a pause has been requested.
population() - Method in record class dev.quassel.ga.puzzle.PuzzleRunRequest
Returns the value of the population record component.
populationSize() - Method in record class dev.quassel.ga.core.GeneticAlgorithmConfig
Returns the value of the populationSize record component.
PuzzleBoard - Class in dev.quassel.ga.puzzle
Immutable sliding-puzzle board.
PuzzleBoard(int, int[]) - Constructor for class dev.quassel.ga.puzzle.PuzzleBoard
Creates a board from explicit tiles.
PuzzleBoard.ExecutionResult - Record Class in dev.quassel.ga.puzzle
Result of executing a move sequence on a board.
PuzzleCandidate - Class in dev.quassel.ga.puzzle
Move-sequence candidate for the sliding-puzzle domain.
PuzzleCandidate(List<Move>) - Constructor for class dev.quassel.ga.puzzle.PuzzleCandidate
Creates a candidate from a move list.
PuzzleCli - Class in dev.quassel.ga.puzzle
Command-line entry point for local puzzle runs and for interacting with the local HTTP runtime.
PuzzleDomain - Class in dev.quassel.ga.puzzle
Sliding-puzzle domain plugged into the generic GA core.
PuzzleDomain(PuzzleBoard, int, int) - Constructor for class dev.quassel.ga.puzzle.PuzzleDomain
Creates one puzzle domain around a fixed start board and candidate length range.
PuzzleHttpServer - Class in dev.quassel.ga.puzzle
Small local HTTP runtime for puzzle runs.
PuzzleHttpServer(int) - Constructor for class dev.quassel.ga.puzzle.PuzzleHttpServer
Starts a local HTTP server bound to 127.0.0.1.
PuzzleRunRequest - Record Class in dev.quassel.ga.puzzle
Request payload for starting one puzzle run through the local runtime/API.
PuzzleRunRequest(int, long, int, int, String) - Constructor for record class dev.quassel.ga.puzzle.PuzzleRunRequest
Creates an instance of a PuzzleRunRequest record class.
PuzzleService - Class in dev.quassel.ga.puzzle
Application service for puzzle runs.
PuzzleService() - Constructor for class dev.quassel.ga.puzzle.PuzzleService
Creates a puzzle service with its own in-memory run registry.

R - Enum constant in enum class dev.quassel.ga.puzzle.Move

Creates a fresh random candidate.
randomCandidate(RandomGenerator) - Method in class dev.quassel.ga.puzzle.PuzzleDomain
 
requestPause() - Method in class dev.quassel.ga.core.SearchRun
Requests the run to pause at the next safe synchronization point.
requestResume() - Method in class dev.quassel.ga.core.SearchRun
Resumes a previously paused run.
requestStop() - Method in class dev.quassel.ga.core.SearchRun
Requests the run to stop at the next safe synchronization point.
run() - Method in record class dev.quassel.ga.core.RunResult
Returns the value of the run record component.
run(GenerationObserver<C>) - Method in class dev.quassel.ga.core.GeneticAlgorithm
Runs the GA synchronously with an internally created run object.
run(String, SearchRun<C>) - Method in interface dev.quassel.ga.core.RunRegistry.RunLauncher
Starts or executes one run inside the registry-managed executor.
run(String, SearchRun<C>, GenerationObserver<C>) - Method in class dev.quassel.ga.core.GeneticAlgorithm
Runs the GA against an externally supplied runtime object.
runId() - Method in record class dev.quassel.ga.core.RunResult
Returns the value of the runId record component.
runId() - Method in record class dev.quassel.ga.core.RunSnapshot
Returns the value of the runId record component.
runId() - Method in class dev.quassel.ga.core.SearchRun
Returns the unique run identifier.
RUNNING - Enum constant in enum class dev.quassel.ga.core.RunStatus
Run is currently advancing.
RunRegistry<C> - Class in dev.quassel.ga.core
In-memory registry for active and finished runs.
RunRegistry() - Constructor for class dev.quassel.ga.core.RunRegistry
Creates an empty in-memory run registry.
RunRegistry.RunLauncher<C> - Interface in dev.quassel.ga.core
Callback used by the registry-managed executor to run one search.
RunResult<C> - Record Class in dev.quassel.ga.core
Final result of a completed or stopped run.
RunResult(String, int, EvaluationResult, C, String, SearchRun<C>) - Constructor for record class dev.quassel.ga.core.RunResult
Creates an instance of a RunResult record class.
RunSnapshot<C> - Record Class in dev.quassel.ga.core
Public snapshot of a run at a given point in time.
RunSnapshot(String, RunStatus, GenerationStats<C>) - Constructor for record class dev.quassel.ga.core.RunSnapshot
Creates an instance of a RunSnapshot record class.
RunStatus - Enum Class in dev.quassel.ga.core

Starts one asynchronous puzzle run.
startedAtMillis() - Method in class dev.quassel.ga.core.SearchRun
Returns the wall-clock start time in milliseconds since the epoch.
status() - Method in record class dev.quassel.ga.core.RunSnapshot
Returns the value of the status record component.
status() - Method in class dev.quassel.ga.core.SearchRun
Returns the current lifecycle state of the run.
STOPPED - Enum constant in enum class dev.quassel.ga.core.RunStatus
Run was stopped or ended without solving.
stopRequested() - Method in class dev.quassel.ga.core.SearchRun

Returns the value of the summary record component.
